$comment: Historical sensor context fixture. NOT live telemetry. Source = csv (imported XLSX from Verdant Genetics export). Companion doc: docs/diary/2026-06-13-multi-tent-baseline.md. Do not wire into runtime, alerts, Action Queue, or AI calls without an explicit task.

flower.notes: Trending warmer/drier. May be acceptable for current flower stage. Visually verify against canopy stress markers before any change.

seedling.notes: Highest watch item. Episodic high-humidity / low-VPD events. Risk: damping-off, mold, stretch, weak root-zone transition.

vegetation.notes: Most stable tent. Use as current benchmark for environmental control.

soil_probes.notes: Early values include zeros / missing entries. Likely probe commissioning, placement, or inactive channels. Per sensor truth rules these must NOT be treated as healthy; keep flagged as invalid/stale/unknown until active placement is confirmed.

missing_information: current live or manual readings per tent

suggested_action_queue_items.title: Investigate seedling tent RH/VPD spikes
checklist: Verify whether spikes were real events or sensor/placement artifacts
Review watering and ventilation/dehumidifier behavior around 2026-06-06 and 2026-06-11

suggested_action_queue_items.title: Monitor flower tent for high-VPD stress markers
checklist: Upload current Sour Diesel canopy photos
If healthy: log as high-VPD flower baseline
If stress visible: review RH/temperature balance BEFORE changing irrigation or feed

follow_ups.24_hour: Capture current manual/live readings for each tent and upload seedling + flower canopy photos.
follow_ups.3_day: Review whether seedling RH spikes recur and whether flower high-VPD conditions correlate with any visible stress.
